nasb.text: Moreover, there are many workmen with you, stonecutters and masons of stone and carpenters, and all men who are skillful in every kind of work.

esv.text: You have an abundance of workmen: stonecutters, masons, carpenters, and all kinds of craftsmen without number, skilled in working

cnv.text: 以及金匠、銀匠、銅匠、鐵匠，多得無法可數；你當起來作工，願耶和華與你同在！”

ccb.text: 你有许多工匠，如凿石匠、砌石匠、木匠等各种能工巧匠，
